'''tabomo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jhool|jhool]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-b-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jhool|jhool]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| tabomo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæbemeth|tæbemeth]] || [[word:tæbemej|tæbemej]] || [[word:tæbemesh|tæbemesh]] || [[word:tæbeme|tæbeme]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tabobomoth|tabobomoth]] || [[word:tabobomoj|tabobomoj]] || [[word:tabobomosh|tabobomosh]] || [[word:tabobomo|tabobomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tabomoth|tabomoth]] || [[word:tabomoj|tabomoj]] || [[word:tabomosh|tabomosh]] || [[word:tabomo|tabomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tabofmoth|tabofmoth]] || [[word:tabofmoj|tabofmoj]] || [[word:tabofmosh|tabofmosh]] || [[word:tabofmof|tabofmof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tabomotho|tabomotho]] || [[word:tabomojo|tabomojo]] || [[word:tabomosho|tabomosho]] || [[word:tabomoko|tabomoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tabomoth|tabomoth]] || [[word:tabomoj|tabomoj]] || [[word:tabomosh|tabomosh]] || [[word:tabomo|tabomo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tabomothol|tabomothol]] || [[word:tabomojol|tabomojol]] || [[word:tabomoshol|tabomoshol]] || [[word:tabomokol|tabomokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tabomothotho|tabomothotho]] || [[word:tabomojojo|tabomojojo]] || [[word:tabomoshosho|tabomoshosho]] || [[word:tabomoko|tabomoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tabomothon|tabomothon]] || [[word:tabomojon|tabomojon]] || [[word:tabomoshon|tabomoshon]] || [[word:tabomokon|tabomokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tabomothoro|tabomothoro]] || [[word:tabomojoro|tabomojoro]] || [[word:tabomoshoro|tabomoshoro]] || [[word:tabomokoro|tabomokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
